risk.reason: Turning firewalld on with no prior configuration could block access to applications and systems because firewalld will block most ports by default once it is turned on.
Turning firewalld on with no prior configuration could block access to applications and systems because firewalld will block most ports by default once it is turned on.
Turning iptables on with no prior configuration could block access to applications and systems because iptables will block most ports by default once it is turned on.
